title: Broad Momentum Beta Bucket Guard
hypothesis: A beta-aware momentum branch with explicit benchmark-bucket caps and a faster recycle window can test whether the family needs bucket balance rather than another drawdown-penalized ranking change.
why_different_from_retired: The retired broad momentum queue already exhausted raw broad, sector-risk, and drawdown-guarded paths, while this branch keeps beta-aware weighting and makes benchmark-bucket balance the primary guardrail.
This branch is also distinct from the beta-defensive continuation because it expands to five names and speeds up recycle timing instead of only making the same beta-aware basket more defensive.
success_criteria: The beta-bucket guard seed must pass the existing validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion policy without exceptions before it can move toward paper-trade preparation.
If it fails, it must still produce enough evidence to decide whether beta-aware bucket balance deserves any future backlog space.

stop_conditions.when: The beta-bucket guard seed passes validation, holdout, and walk-forward promotion rules under the current policy.
The seed records a terminal promotion decision and still fails the policy, especially on benchmark-relative split or walk-forward evidence.

bootstrap.program_title: Broad Momentum Beta Bucket Guard Program
bootstrap.objective: Run one beta-aware momentum branch with explicit benchmark-bucket caps and a faster recycle window so the family can test bucket balance without relying on drawdown-penalized ranking.
bootstrap.branch_rationale: The guarded drawdown branch answers one concentration question, but it still leaves open whether the momentum engine works better when beta-aware weighting is kept and benchmark-bucket balance becomes the main guardrail. This branch is the bounded test for that alternative.
positive_hypotheses: Keeping beta-vol-inverse weighting while shortening the recycle window can preserve breadth without giving up the defensive posture learned from the beta-defensive branch.
One-name benchmark-bucket caps can stop the family from drifting back into the benchmark-relative concentration pattern that damaged prior holdout evidence.

seed_stack.label: Beta-defensive control
seed_stack.rationale: Reference control for the governed defensive beta-aware continuation branch.

seed_stack.label: Beta-bucket guard seed
seed_stack.rationale: Repo-backed beta-aware branch with explicit benchmark-bucket caps and a faster recycle window.

campaign_path.label: Momentum Beta-Bucket Guard Seed
campaign_path.purpose: Execute the beta-aware bucket-guard momentum family and decide whether it should be promoted or retired.
